TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_qsinu, title = qsinu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/qsinu} }

S.FORM: kwara' qsinu(ke' na Plmukan: ŚčēÁČ©), insuna' qsya' ru rhzyal. bniq na utux kayal kwara'. huzil / hoyin Áčó ngyaw Ť≤ď bzyok / biyak ŤĪ¨ kacing / kating ÁČõ mit Áĺä yungay ÁĆī olit ťľ† welung ťõě qbhniq / piyit ť≥• Qulih / 'cyux ť≠ö Rme' ť¶¨ zo ŤĪ° kli' Ťôé mqu' Ťõá ksipa' ťĺú

kwara' qsinu(ke' na Plmukan: ŚčēÁČ©), insuna' qsya' ru rhzyal. bniq na utux kayal kwara'. huzil / hoyin Áčó ngyaw Ť≤ď bzyok / biyak ŤĪ¨ kacing / kating ÁČõ mit Áĺä yungay ÁĆī olit ťľ† welung ťõě qbhniq / piyit ť≥• Qulih / 'cyux ť≠ö Rme' ť¶¨ zo ŤĪ° kli' Ťôé mqu' Ťõá ksipa' ťĺú
S.PHON: kwara Ē qs~…ēinu(ke Ē na plmukan: **), ins~…ēuna Ē qs~…ēja Ē ru rńßzjal. ő≤niq na utux kajal kwara Ē. ńßuzil / ńßojin * Ňčjaw * ő≤zjok / ő≤ijak * ka ¶~ ®iŇč / katiŇč * mit * juŇčaj * olit * weluŇč * qő≤ńßniq / pijit * qulińß / Ē ¶~ ®jux * rme Ē * zo * kli Ē * mqu Ē * ks~…ēipa Ē *
